Visit Grand Bahama Island × @Callie.Rounds

An Island Partnership,
Built for the Feed

Adventure and underwater content built around the island, delivered to an audience that travels for this exact kind of trip.

The Trip

Following our conversation on Instagram, this is a proposed partnership framework to lock in the stay on Grand Bahama and shape the content around what the island does best.

Dates: Arrival is locked to April 21. Departure falls somewhere between April 28 and April 30, depending on what works best for your team and the activities you want to feature.

What I would like to request for the collaboration:

  • Full-board lodging for the duration of the stay
  • Scooter or car rental for the duration of the collaboration
  • Any activities you want to feature

The top target is the tiger shark free dive. If your team has access or a partner operator, I would build the hero content around that. The rest of the activities can be shaped around whatever you want to spotlight.

About Me

Callie Rounds

@callie.rounds
100K+ Followers · Extreme Sports · Underwater & Adventure Content

Adventure athlete and storyteller, drawn to the edge. Skydiving, freediving, paragliding, rock climbing, and documenting the adventure as it unfolds.

View Profile
Skills & Capabilities
Licensed skydiver with 70+ jumps across 8 countries
Pilot in training
Advanced backcountry skier, comfortable in off-piste and alpine terrain
Advanced scuba and freediving certified, comfortable shooting underwater content in caves, cenotes, shipwrecks, and open ocean
Paragliding pilot with extensive flight experience across mountain and coastal environments
Rock climbing and bouldering, comfortable shooting on vertical terrain and remote outdoor locations
Comfortable cliff jumping up to 25 m
Bungee jumping, sandboarding, wakeboarding, and general adventure sports across diverse terrain and conditions
End-to-end content production in the field: concept, shoot, edit, and deliver ready-to-post Reels, short-form video, and cinematic content
Past Brand Partnerships
Proposed Activities

After a bit of research, these are some things that I found that would be incredible to do. Tiger Beach would be my top choice. The rest is just options I've created, and I'm happy to swap out anything your team wants to feature or any partner operators you already work with.

That said, I trust your recommendations and knowledge of the island completely, so anything you suggest beyond this list, I am super open to exploring.

Content Equipment

Everything shot, edited, and delivered on my own gear.

  • DJI Drones
  • Insta360 Camera
  • Underwater GoPro
  • DJI Osmo Camera
  • iPhone POV
  • Full Post-Production
Partnership Structure
01

Hosted Stay

Grand Bahama Island covers full-board lodging from the April 21 arrival through departure between April 28 and April 30, the activities I shoot around on the island, and ideally a scooter or car to move between locations. Flights and personal costs on my side.

02

UGC Deliverables

UGC content is included in the hosted collaboration at no additional fee. The specific deliverables depend on what gets provided. Once the hotel and activities are locked in, I can confirm exactly what I would produce for each one.

03

@callie.rounds Posts

Anything posted to my own page (Reel or carousel) is a paid add-on, priced in tiers. The more posts we lock in together, the better the per-post rate. See rates below.

Posting Rates for @callie.rounds

One Post
$3,000
Heli-skydive Reel — the flagship extreme sport piece. The heli-skydive concept is exclusive to this tier and is not included in standard posts.
Two Posts
$2,300 each
$4,600 total
Two Reels or carousels on @callie.rounds. Heli-skydive counts as one if selected, otherwise both are standard extreme sport or island content pieces.
Three Posts
$1,800 each
$5,400 total
Three Reels or carousels. Best value per post. Heli-skydive can be one of the three, or we can go all standard content across the series.
